name: Jinjian Cereals Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinjian Cereals Industry Co., Ltd. produces, processes, and sells grain and oil products in China. It offers rice, flour, noodles, vegetable oil, rice noodles, dairy products, candies, medicines, and other products. The company also primarily exports rice mill machines, tea seed meals, and organic fertilizers to Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, the Middle East, Africa, Australia, etc. Jinjian Cereals Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Changde, China.
